claim: This source kit is not an authorization boundary, remote search service, analytics system, backend, Stable release, or distribution-parity claim.

semantics.nativeBasis: Public CommandPalette combobox/listbox semantics inside an optional modal or embedded workbench.
semantics.rolePolicy: Loading and empty result state are owned by CommandPalette; adapter failures expose retry; result-count announcements are opt-in.

keyboard.behavior: Moves the active command through enabled results using the public CommandPalette contract.
Executes the active command unless IME composition is in progress.
Clears or closes the palette and restores focus according to the public CommandPalette contract.
Optionally opens the modal from non-editable content; the listener does not exist when disabled.

nonColor: Active commands, loading, empty, error, shortcut, preview, and recent-result states use text and native selection in addition to violet or green signals.
responsive: The optional mobile entry replaces the desktop modal trigger at narrow widths, logical properties support RTL, and coarse input receives 44 CSS-pixel targets.
consumerResponsibilities: Authorize every result and command at execution time; filtering or hiding is not authorization.
Supply abort-aware search and execution adapters with safe navigation, privacy, logging, rate-limit, offline, timeout, and retry policy.
Localize visible and spoken strings and validate ranking, keyboard, touch, mobile, zoom, and assistive-technology behavior with real result volumes.
